findings.description: ProxyResource_1 _N suffix collision — AlertModification and AlertsSummary extend ProxyResource_1 instead of ProxyResource. Suggests TypeSpec model naming collision.

notes: Previous PR #37633 (same package) had similar ProxyResource_1 issue plus KnownTimeRange _N prefix issue. KnownTimeRange is now fixed (OneD, OneH, SevenD, ThirtyD). ProxyResource_1 still present.
